title: SOPS Configuration Structure
description: Structure of a .sops.yaml configuration file for SOPS creation rules and key management

fields.name: creation_rules
fields.description: Rules governing which keys to use when creating new encrypted files

fields.name: path_regex
fields.description: Regex pattern matching file paths this rule applies to

fields.name: kms
fields.description: Comma-separated list of AWS KMS key ARNs

fields.name: gcp_kms
fields.description: Comma-separated list of GCP KMS resource IDs

fields.name: age
fields.description: Comma-separated list of age public keys

fields.name: encrypted_regex
fields.description: Regex matching YAML/JSON keys whose values should be encrypted

fields.name: unencrypted_regex
fields.description: Regex matching YAML/JSON keys whose values should NOT be encrypted

fields.name: key_groups
fields.description: Key groups for Shamir Secret Sharing multi-factor access

fields.name: shamir_threshold
fields.description: Minimum number of key groups required for decryption
